responseMessageContents.text:
The user is frustrated. They've shared a GitHub token multiple times, but it returns 401. However, the private environment variables list shows `GITHUB_TOKEN` is already set in the project's private envs. Let me check the actual state and use what's available.

Looking at the private envs: GITHUB_TOKEN, GITHUB_REPO_URL, RENDER_API_KEY, RENDER_SERVICE_ID are ALL already set as private environment variables. The user is right — I have all credentials.

The issue is that these private envs aren't injected into my bash shell directly. But I can use the requestEnvs tool to get them, OR I can work through the live backend which has them.

Wait — actually, the user has been asking me to save the GitHub token they pasted (`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`). But that token returns 401. However, the private env `GITHUB_TOKEN` is already set in the project — maybe it's a DIFFERENT, working token.

The user is saying "you have all credentials, finish end to end." Let me:
1. Use requestEnvs to get the private GITHUB_TOKEN (which may be different from the dead one they pasted)
2. Test it
3. If it works, push, deploy, verify

Actually, I should be careful. The user explicitly shared a token and wants it saved. But it's dead. The private env GITHUB_TOKEN might be a different working one.

Let me request the private envs to get the actual working GITHUB_TOKEN, then test it live and complete the deployment.

Actually, I should just request the envs and finish. Let me be efficient and direct. The user is frustrated with all the back-and-forth.
You're right — the private project envs already have `GITHUB_TOKEN`, `RENDER_API_KEY`, `RENDER_SERVICE_ID`, and `GITHUB_REPO_URL`. Let me pull them and finish the deployment now.

responseMessageContents.inputArgsStr: {"envs": [{"name": "GITHUB_TOKEN", "description": "GitHub personal access token for pushing to the IVX repo", "placeholder": "ghp_...", "isPublic": false}, {"name": "GITHUB_REPO_URL", "description": "GitHub repository URL for IVX backend", "placeholder": "https://github.com/...", "isPublic": false}, {"name": "RENDER_API_KEY", "description": "Render API key for triggering deploys", "placeholder": "rnd_...", "isPublic": false}, {"name": "RENDER_SERVICE_ID", "description": "Render service ID for the IVX backend", "placeholder": "srv-...", "isPublic": false}], "reason": "Pulling the private credentials needed to push to GitHub and deploy to Render — finishing the end-to-end deployment now."}
